title: Authors and Citation
text: Pawan Rama Mali. Author, maintainer, copyright holder.

title: Authors and Citation
text: Mali P (2026). r4sub: Easily Install Load R4SUB Ecosystem. R package version 0.1.0, https://r4sub.github.io/r4sub/.
code: @Manual{,   title = {r4sub: Easily Install and Load the R4SUB Ecosystem},   author = {Pawan Rama Mali},   year = {2026},   note = {R package version 0.1.0},   url = {https://r4sub.github.io/r4sub/}, }

title: r4sub — R for Regulatory Submission
text: r4sub meta-package R4SUB (R Regulatory Submission) clinical submission readiness ecosystem. single library(r4sub) call installs attaches core packages.

title: r4sub — R for Regulatory Submission
text: Development version:

title: r4sub — R for Regulatory Submission
code: library(r4sub) # ── Attaching R4SUB packages ─────────────────────────────────────────── #   r4subcore      0.1.2 #   r4subtrace     0.1.1 #   r4subscore     0.1.1 #   r4subrisk      0.1.1 #   r4subdata      0.1.2 #   r4subprofile   0.1.1 #   r4subusability 0.1.0  # All ecosystem functions are now available data(evidence_pharma)                                    # r4subdata scores <- compute_indicator_scores(evidence_pharma)      # r4subscore sci    <- compute_sci(compute_pillar_scores(scores))     # r4subscore  # Ecosystem utilities r4sub_packages()   # versions and attachment status r4sub_status()     # installation check r4sub_conflicts()  # detect function name collisions r4sub_news()       # what changed in each package r4sub_cite()       # citation info for regulatory documents

title: r4sub — R for Regulatory Submission
text: Use :: operator explicit conflicts arise: Run r4sub_conflicts() library(r4sub) see collisions.

title: r4sub — R for Regulatory Submission
text: MIT

title: Core R4SUB packages — core_packages
text: Returns names R4SUB packages automatically attached library(r4sub) called.

title: Core R4SUB packages — core_packages
text: character vector package names.

what: r4sub: Easily Install and Load the R4SUB Ecosystem — r4sub-package
title: r4sub: Easily Install and Load the R4SUB Ecosystem — r4sub-package
text: 'r4sub' package meta-package installs loads core packages R4SUB (R Regulatory Submission) clinical submission readiness ecosystem. Loading 'r4sub' attaches 'r4subcore', 'r4subtrace', 'r4subscore', 'r4subrisk', 'r4subdata', 'r4subprofile'. dashboard package 'r4subui' available auto-attached.

title: r4sub: Easily Install and Load the R4SUB Ecosystem — r4sub-package
text: Maintainer: Pawan Rama Mali prm@outlook.(ORCID) [copyright holder]

title: Cite the R4SUB Ecosystem — r4sub_cite
text: Prints citation information R4SUB ecosystem installed core package. Use citing R4SUB tools regulatory submission document, scientific paper, validation report.

title: Cite the R4SUB Ecosystem — r4sub_cite
text: package Character. Name specific R4SUB package cite. NULL (default), cites installed core packages plus meta-package.

title: Cite the R4SUB Ecosystem — r4sub_cite
text: Invisibly returns named list citation objects, one per package. Called side effect printing citation information console.

title: Cite the R4SUB Ecosystem — r4sub_cite
code: r4sub_cite() #>  #> ── r4sub ── #>  #> To cite package ‘r4sub’ in publications use: #>  #>   Mali P (2026). _r4sub: Easily Install and Load the R4SUB Ecosystem_. #>   R package version 0.1.0, <https://r4sub.github.io/r4sub/>. #>  #> A BibTeX entry for LaTeX users is #>  #>   @Manual{, #>     title = {r4sub: Easily Install and Load the R4SUB Ecosystem}, #>     author = {Pawan Rama Mali}, #>     year = {2026}, #>     note = {R package version 0.1.0}, #>     url = {https://r4sub.github.io/r4sub/}, #>   } #> ── r4subcore ── #>  #> To cite package ‘r4subcore’ in publications use: #>  #>   Mali P (2026). _r4subcore: Core Data Contracts, Parsers, and Scoring #>   Primitives for Clinical Submission Readiness_. R package version #>   0.1.0, <https://github.com/R4SUB/r4subcore>. #>  #> A BibTeX entry for LaTeX users is #>  #>   @Manual{, #>     title = {r4subcore: Core Data Contracts, Parsers, and Scoring Primitives for #> Clinical Submission Readiness}, #>     author = {Pawan Rama Mali}, #>     year = {2026}, #>     note = {R package version 0.1.0}, #>     url = {https://github.com/R4SUB/r4subcore}, #>   } #> ── r4subtrace ── #>  #> To cite package ‘r4subtrace’ in publications use: #>  #>   Mali P (2026). _r4subtrace: Traceability Engine for Clinical #>   Submission Readiness_. R package version 0.1.0, #>   <https://github.com/R4SUB/r4subtrace>. #>  #> A BibTeX entry for LaTeX users is #>  #>   @Manual{, #>     title = {r4subtrace: Traceability Engine for Clinical Submission Readiness}, #>     author = {Pawan Rama Mali}, #>     year = {2026}, #>     note = {R package version 0.1.0}, #>     url = {https://github.com/R4SUB/r4subtrace}, #>   } #> ── r4subscore ── #>  #> To cite package ‘r4subscore’ in publications use: #>  #>   Mali P (2026). _r4subscore: Submission Confidence Index Engine_. R #>   package version 0.1.0, <https://github.com/R4SUB/r4subscore>. #>  #> A BibTeX entry for LaTeX users is #>  #>   @Manual{, #>     title = {r4subscore: Submission Confidence Index Engine}, #>     author = {Pawan Rama Mali}, #>     year = {2026}, #>     note = {R package version 0.1.0}, #>     url = {https://github.com/R4SUB/r4subscore}, #>   } #> ── r4subrisk ── #>  #> To cite package ‘r4subrisk’ in publications use: #>  #>   Mali P (2026). _r4subrisk: Risk Quantification Engine for Clinical #>   Submission Readiness_. R package version 0.1.0, #>   <https://github.com/R4SUB/r4subrisk>. #>  #> A BibTeX entry for LaTeX users is #>  #>   @Manual{, #>     title = {r4subrisk: Risk Quantification Engine for Clinical Submission Readiness}, #>     author = {Pawan Rama Mali}, #>     year = {2026}, #>     note = {R package version 0.1.0}, #>     url = {https://github.com/R4SUB/r4subrisk}, #>   } #> ── r4subdata ── #>  #> To cite package ‘r4subdata’ in publications use: #>  #>   Mali P (2026). _r4subdata: Example Datasets for Clinical Submission #>   Readiness_. R package version 0.1.1, #>   <https://github.com/R4SUB/r4subdata>. #>  #> A BibTeX entry for LaTeX users is #>  #>   @Manual{, #>     title = {r4subdata: Example Datasets for Clinical Submission Readiness}, #>     author = {Pawan Rama Mali}, #>     year = {2026}, #>     note = {R package version 0.1.1}, #>     url = {https://github.com/R4SUB/r4subdata}, #>   } #> ── r4subprofile ── #>  #> To cite package ‘r4subprofile’ in publications use: #>  #>   Mali P (2026). _r4subprofile: Regulatory Submission Profiles for #>   Clinical Submission Readiness_. R package version 0.1.0, #>   <https://github.com/R4SUB/r4subprofile>. #>  #> A BibTeX entry for LaTeX users is #>  #>   @Manual{, #>     title = {r4subprofile: Regulatory Submission Profiles for Clinical Submission Readiness}, #>     author = {Pawan Rama Mali}, #>     year = {2026}, #>     note = {R package version 0.1.0}, #>     url = {https://github.com/R4SUB/r4subprofile}, #>   } r4sub_cite("r4subcore") #> ── r4subcore ── #>  #> To cite package ‘r4subcore’ in publications use: #>  #>   Mali P (2026). _r4subcore: Core Data Contracts, Parsers, and Scoring #>   Primitives for Clinical Submission Readiness_. title: Show R4SUB Function Conflicts — r4sub_conflicts
text: Reports exported function name collisions attached R4SUB packages loaded packages.

title: Show R4SUB Function Conflicts — r4sub_conflicts
text: tibble columns: func, r4sub_package, other_package. Returned invisibly. Prints conflicts exist.

title: Show R4SUB Function Conflicts — r4sub_conflicts
code: r4sub_conflicts() #> ✔ No conflicts detected between R4SUB and other packages.

title: Show R4SUB Ecosystem News — r4sub_news
text: Prints NEWS entries installed R4SUB ecosystem package. Useful tracking changed across ecosystem updating.

title: Show R4SUB Ecosystem News — r4sub_news
text: package Character. Name specific R4SUB package show news . Must one core R4SUB packages. NULL (default), shows news installed core packages.

title: Show R4SUB Ecosystem News — r4sub_news
text: Invisibly returns named list news database objects, one per package. Called side effect printing NEWS entries console.

title: Show R4SUB Ecosystem News — r4sub_news
code: r4sub_news() #> ! No NEWS available for r4subcore. #> ! No NEWS available for r4subtrace. #> ! No NEWS available for r4subscore. #> ! No NEWS available for r4subrisk. #> ! No NEWS available for r4subdata. #> ! No NEWS available for r4subprofile. r4sub_news("r4subcore") #> ! No NEWS available for r4subcore.

title: List R4SUB Ecosystem Packages — r4sub_packages
text: Returns tibble R4SUB packages installed version current attachment status.

title: List R4SUB Ecosystem Packages — r4sub_packages
text: include_self Logical. TRUE (default), includes r4sub meta-package listing.

title: List R4SUB Ecosystem Packages — r4sub_packages
text: tibble columns: package, version, attached.

title: List R4SUB Ecosystem Packages — r4sub_packages
code: r4sub_packages() #> # A tibble: 8 × 3 #>   package      version attached #>   <chr>        <chr>   <lgl>    #> 1 r4sub        0.1.0   TRUE     #> 2 r4subcore    0.1.0   TRUE     #> 3 r4subtrace   0.1.0   TRUE     #> 4 r4subscore   0.1.0   TRUE     #> 5 r4subrisk    0.1.0   TRUE     #> 6 r4subdata    0.1.1   TRUE     #> 7 r4subprofile 0.1.0   TRUE     #> 8 r4subui      NA      FALSE

what: Check R4SUB Package Installation Status — r4sub_status
title: Check R4SUB Package Installation Status — r4sub_status
text: Reports installed version R4SUB ecosystem package highlights packages installed.

title: Check R4SUB Package Installation Status — r4sub_status
Check R4SUB Package Installation Status — r4sub_status
text: tibble columns: package, installed. Returned invisibly. Called side effect printing installation status console.

title: Check R4SUB Package Installation Status — r4sub_status
code: r4sub_status() #> ! Not installed: r4subui #> ✔ 7 R4SUB packages installed.

title: r4sub 0.1.0
text: Initial CRAN release. core_packages(): list 6 auto-attached ecosystem packages. r4sub_packages(): show packages version attachment status. r4sub_status(): check ecosystem packages installed. r4sub_conflicts(): detect function name conflicts loaded packages. r4sub_news(): print NEWS ecosystem package. r4sub_cite(): print citation information regulatory academic use. Startup message can suppressed options(r4sub.quiet = TRUE).
